meta.project: PRD Creator — Full-Stack AI Document Factory

product_overview: A web app that creates complete project documentation (PRDs, design docs, tech specs, architecture docs) through a conversational AI workspace powered by Gemini, with live Markdown preview, editing, verification, image generation, and export capabilities.
core_goals: Enable rapid creation of structured project documents via conversational AI with streaming responses and document templates.
Provide a split-pane workspace for chat-driven generation and live Markdown preview with inline editing and versioning.
Offer tools to verify, fix, and export generated documentation as individual Markdown files or a bundled ZIP.
Keep session data local (IndexedDB) for offline-first persistence and fast iteration per project session.

features.name: Create Project Session
features.description: Create a new project session by entering a name and selecting a project type, then open the workspace for that session.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click "New Project" button -> Enter project name in modal input -> Select project type from list (Web/Mobile) -> Click Create button -> See redirect to /session/[id] -> See workspace load for the new session
Navigate to / -> Click "New Project" button -> Leave project name empty -> Click Create button -> See validation error displayed in modal -> Modal remains open

features.name: Delete Project Session
features.description: Remove an existing project session from the dashboard list.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Hover over a session card to reveal delete button -> Click delete button -> Confirm deletion (if prompted) -> See session card removed from the list
Navigate to / -> Hover over a session card to reveal delete button -> Click delete button -> Cancel deletion in confirmation dialog -> See session card remain in the list

features.name: AI Chat Document Generation
features.description: Chat with the AI to generate project documents in Auto or Guided mode, with streaming responses and document-type generation controls.
user_flows: Navigate to /session/[id] -> Type a message in the chat input -> Press Enter or click send button -> Click a document type button in the toolbar to request a specific document -> Toggle to Guided mode -> See guided progress bar appear -> View streaming AI responses in real-time -> See generated document appear as a new tab in DocPreview

Navigate to /session/[id] -> Type a message in the chat input -> Press Enter or click send button -> Observe no streaming AI response (missing or invalid GEMINI_API_KEY) -> See no document generated and no API-key error UI

features.name: Document Preview and Editing
features.description: View generated documents rendered from Markdown, edit inline, toggle task list items, open images, and request section-specific AI changes.
user_flows: Navigate to /session/[id] -> Click document tabs to switch between documents -> Read rendered markdown content with syntax highlighting -> Click edit button to enter inline edit mode -> Modify document content in textarea -> Click save -> See updated rendered markdown in DocPreview

Navigate to /session/[id] -> Click document tabs to switch to a document -> Click edit button to enter inline edit mode -> Modify document content in textarea -> Click cancel -> See original rendered markdown restored (edits discarded)

features.name: Document Version History and Diff
features.description: Inspect previous document versions and compare them side-by-side with diff highlighting.
user_flows: Navigate to /session/[id] -> Click history/diff toggle button -> View previous document versions list -> Select two versions to compare -> See side-by-side diff viewer with changes highlighted
Navigate to /session/[id] -> Click history/diff toggle button -> See message indicating no history available when document has no saved versions

features.name: Document Export
features.description: Export a single document as a Markdown file or export all session documents as a ZIP archive.
user_flows: Navigate to /session/[id] -> Open DocPreview for a document -> Click export button on a single document -> Browser downloads the .md file
Navigate to /session/[id] -> Click export all button -> Browser downloads a ZIP archive containing all session .md files
Navigate to /session/[id] -> Click export all button when no documents exist -> See export button disabled or see an error notification indicating nothing to export

features.name: Document Verifier
features.description: Run a cybernetic verifier that analyzes documents for consistency issues, shows evidence, and can apply fixes individually or in bulk.
user_flows: Navigate to /session/[id] -> Toggle verifier panel open -> Click start verification button -> View animated verification progress -> Browse issues sorted by severity -> Expand an issue card to view evidence details -> Click apply fix on an individual issue -> See patch applied to the affected document

Navigate to /session/[id] -> Toggle verifier panel open -> Click start verification button when session has fewer than 2 documents -> See message indicating verifier requires at least 2 documents and verification does not run

features.name: Image Generation
features.description: Generate technical diagrams and visualizations via AI from a textual prompt and view them inline or fullscreen.
user_flows: Navigate to /session/[id] -> Enter image description in prompt input -> Click generate image button -> View generated image inline in chat -> Click image to open fullscreen modal

Navigate to /session/[id] -> Enter image description in prompt input -> Click generate image button -> Observe image generation fail (no retry mechanism) -> See error or no image and need to manually reissue request

features.name: Session Settings
features.description: Configure which document types are enabled for the session and edit custom instructions per document type.
user_flows: Navigate to /session/[id] -> Open settings panel -> Toggle document types on/off -> Edit custom instructions for a document type -> Click save -> See settings persist for the session
Navigate to /session/[id] -> Open settings panel -> Edit custom instructions -> Click reset to defaults -> Click cancel in confirmation dialog -> See custom instructions remain unchanged

routes.description: Dashboard listing all project sessions with create/delete functionality
Main workspace with chat panel, document preview, verifier, and settings

Enter project name in modal input

Session is created and user is redirected to /session/[id]

Click delete button
Session is removed from the list

Click edit button to enter inline edit mode

Edit custom instructions per document type

known_limitations.issue: No API key validation UI - fails silently if GEMINI_API_KEY is missing
known_limitations.impact: Users see no error feedback when API key is not configured
App will not work in browsers without IndexedDB support

known_limitations.issue: Verifier requires at least 2 documents to function
Image generation has no retry mechanism
known_limitations.impact: Failed image generations require manual retry
